description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The exterior is predominantly white with gold and gray accent stripes along the wings and tail, and the registration 'F-AOQA' is visible on the fuselage and wing. The aircraft features a tricycle landing gear setup, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the engine. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned at the front of the fuselage, and appears to be designed for one or two occupants. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration.
description: A small, white, single-engine low-wing airplane with gold and gray stripes, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, propeller at the nose, cockpit canopy, and the registration 'F-AOQA' on the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose wheel, and the symmetrical low-wing configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail, cockpit, and wing details, with the registration visible on the fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single or dual seat.
